variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17041 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17041 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17041 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 135.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 135.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 114.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): S122X5, Height 1 (H1): 340.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 47.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 42.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter CF 1420 Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17041
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter CF 1420 Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17041
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filter secondary elements offer a comprehensive protection against wear / Engine is protected even if the main filter component is replaced or damaged. While the main element is being replaced, extreme or dusty operating conditions can sometimes occur - the secondary element continues to provide optimum protection for a clean air.
specifications: Style: Secondary Element, Dimension A: 117.0 mm, Dimension D: 136.0 mm, Dimension H: 340.0 mm
